title: Coral Bay Residence Nha Trang
availability: Few rooms left at this price
top_reviews: Quiet floor and strong air conditioning; beach is a short walk.
Good value for a sea-view room compared to bigger chains nearby.

title: Truong Hai Hotel
top_reviews: Room is spacious for the price and it was clean.
Hard to find the first time, but overall a good stay near the beach.

title: Anna Belle Doi Rong Hotel
top_reviews: Guests like the view from higher floors; breakfast is simple but fresh.
Some mention slower check-in during peak hours.

title: Azure Pearl Nha Trang
top_reviews: Pool and rooftop bar are the highlight; staff remembered our anniversary.
Premium feel without the resort price tag of Cam Ranh properties.

title: Golden Wave Suites
top_reviews: Good value for money; family room layout worked well for two kids.
Elevator wait times during breakfast rush.

title: Seaside Pearl Hotel
top_reviews: Great beach access and helpful front desk for tour bookings.
Clean rooms; ask for a high floor to avoid street noise.

title: Horizon City Hotel Nha Trang
top_reviews: Central location for food and night market; rooms compact but modern.
Housekeeping was thorough every day.

title: Marina Boutique Nha Trang
top_reviews: Small property but very personal service; excellent breakfast selection.
Higher rate than neighbors but felt worth it for a special trip.

title: Hoan Kiem City Hotel
top_reviews: Walkable to the lake and old quarter; compact but spotless rooms.
Street-facing rooms can be noisy — request interior wing.

title: West Lake Boutique Hanoi
top_reviews: Calm lake views and slower pace than the old quarter core.
Excellent coffee and small-plate breakfast.

title: Noi Bai Express Inn
top_reviews: Fine for one night before a flight; shuttle timing is reliable.
Basic rooms — manage expectations vs central Hanoi hotels.

title: My Khe Beach Tower Da Nang
top_reviews: Direct beach crossing; sunrise from balcony was worth it.
Pool deck gets crowded midday — go early.

title: Han River Executive Da Nang
top_reviews: River view at night is excellent; gym is small but usable.
Good base between airport and Hoi An day trips.

title: Marble Mountains View Lodge
top_reviews: Budget-friendly with honest photos; staff helped book Marble Mountain tickets.
Not on the sand — use grab to the beach strip.
